headline: Sentiment down 27% this week, optimism declining
key_insights: Fears trending down 20% over 7 days (moderate momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations exploded to 82.3 with 125 quotes - 103 at strong intensity showing people are extremely agitated today.
• This surge from yesterday's 20.5 puts frustrations in the upper half of recent activity, though still below the 49-day peak.
• Both fears and optimism remain well below average despite slight improvements from yesterday's levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
